creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, 5 Dec 2009 19:50:03 GMTSat, 05 Dec 2009 20:40:16 +0100, Heino 
Tiedemann wrote:
>  Yes, here is no "libusb" installed (i use amarok just to listen lokal
>  files), und all ports are build or rebuild on 8.
> 
>  Is there a dependency to devel/libusb missung?
FreeBSD 8 and greater has its own libusb and devel/libusb is not required now. 
I can suppose that your ports have not been properly updated after OS update. 
Try to rebuild audio/libnjb and then amarok.

Max
